name: Vapman Standard Egg Case
summary: Protect your Vapman vaporiser with confidence using the Vapman Standard Case.
description: Protect your Vapman vaporiser with confidence using the Vapman Standard Case. This lightweight, hemp fibre case combines everyday protection with a transparent, stylish finish—keeping your device safe while showcasing its iconic design. Its clear hemp fibre construction offers a unique blend of strength and visibility—perfect for users who appreciate both practicality and design. Crafted from eco-conscious, impact-resistant materials, this case is built to withstand travel and daily wear. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
